summary: Generated OG image (1200x630, Forge branding, funnel score visualization). Built branded HTML email template for 3-touch follow-up sequence with dark Forge styling, responsive layout, position-specific CTAs. Updated cron sender to use HTML+text fallback via Resend. Added vercel.json with cron schedules (followup-sender every 1min, stale-scans every 15min). The full follow-up pipeline is now end-to-end: trigger → DB insert → cron pick-up → AI-generate → HTML wrap → Resend → status update.
nextSteps: Test follow-up sequence with a real scan + exit
Set CRON_SECRET in Vercel env vars
